ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Quote_Request', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Quote_Business_Type__c, 'Feature Update')), ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL(Contract_attached_to_the_opportunity__c, 'There is no contract yet') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: We can only create a quote if the contract is already drafted. Please be sure to attach the contract to the opp to proceed.
